instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity requires precise integration of physics-based and data-driven models to accurately represent nonlinear phenomena. Validation and verification include traceability checks between SysML models and simulation tools (e.g., Simulink), ensuring transformation correctness. Uncertainty is quantified using probabilistic latent variable models, while quality assurance involves cross-validation of model outputs for consistency and accuracy."
]
